text:

Not yet clear WHICH SHITHOLES 🕳️🇦🇫 get SLAPPED 🚫, but White House Karoline Leavitt 💅📰 spilled to Fox: WIDENING Trump's OG BAN on 19 THIRD WORLD FAILSTATES 🌍💥 – Africa 🦁, Middle East 🕌, Caribbean 🏝️ getting COCKBLOCKED 🍆🚫!

TIMING? Post-DC SHOOTING 😱🔫 where AFGHAN NATIONAL 🕌🇦🇫 (Biden's OP ALLIES WELCOME 🚀💩 flop, 100K poured in 🥴) BLASTED National Guard BABES 👮‍♀️💔 – RIP Sarah Beckstrom 20yo 😢🌹, Andrew Wolfe 24yo THUMBS UP 💪😩 but STILL CRIT in hosp. GTFO 🥾💨!'

Thanksgiving TRUTH BOMB 💣🦃: Refugees = SOCIAL DYSFUNCTION 🤡🏚️, mass DEPORTATIONS 🛫👮‍♂️, SLASH refugee admits 📉🙅‍♂️, END birthright citizenship BS 🍼🚫 for anchor babies! Afghan Coalition 😢🇦🇫 whining 'One bad apple 🍎😈, don't FORGET 20YR PARTNERSHIP 🫂🕌' – UN simping too 📜🌐 'Follow asylum rules!' 😂🤡 But Trump 2.0 = BORDER WALL 2.0 🧱🇺🇸 ELECTRIC, Noem's got that Dakota DOG-WHISTLE 🐕📢 banning the FLOOD 🏊‍♂️🌊 of CRIMINALS till AMERICA FIRST 🦅🔥! DHS overhauling vetting like Jensen fixes chips 🚀🖥️ – NO MORE BIDEN BORDER ORGY 💦🚪! Patrick Morrisey WV Gov 🙌 saying Wolfe's a FIGHTER 💪🏥, while Edlow USCIS daddy 👨‍💼📜 pauses EVERYTHING till aliens SCREENED to OBLIVION 🧹🔍. Third world CUMMERS 💨🌍?
